actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (fileID: 697146254) on GameObject 'Room 2' uses script GUID 82aa235159f620648803cf53217af1e5 (class: room2). Serialized field doorAnim is assigned to Animator with fileID 521131961. When public no-arg methods SetSphereCheck, SetCubeCheck, and SetPyramidCheck are all called and doorOpen is false, Update() will set doorOpen = true and invoke doorAnim.Play('DoorOpen', 0, 0.0f). No UnityEvent m_Calls are defined on this component; interaction is via these public methods.

MonoBehaviour (fileID: 697146254) on GameObject 'Room 2' uses script GUID 82aa235159f620648803cf53217af1e5 (class: room2). Serialized field doorAnim is assigned (Animator fileID: 521131961). MonoBehaviour (fileID: 5374773463603666079) on prefab instance 'Cube_salle2' uses script GUID 2723dba42bd113044ad231906b498006 (class: SnapToTrigger). This matches the provided script source. Object has Rigidbody (Has_Rigidbody: true) and BoxCollider (id: 1659405682678754060, m_IsTrigger: 0). Start() and Update() run automatically; Update() rotates only when isSnapped == true. The only public method is Snap(Vector3), which requires a parameter and cannot be invoked via Trigger per the test harness constraints. To fully cover Snap() and the isSnapped branch in Update(), an external trigger/wrapper (no-arg) that calls Snap(transform.position) is required.
